children.text: First, plants are very important for people because they meet our basic needs.
children.cn: 首先，植物对人们非常重要，因为它们满足了我们的基本需求。
children.notes: First: 首先; meet our basic needs: 满足我们的基本需求
children.statement: “meet” 在这里是“遇见，碰面”的意思。
children.explanation: 在这句话中，meet 意为“满足（需求、期望等）”，而不是字面上的“遇见”。
children.keywords: First, important, people, meet, basic needs

children.text: They provide us with food, wood, and even medicine.
children.cn: 它们为我们提供食物、木材甚至药物。
children.notes: provide sb. with sth.: 为某人提供某物; wood: 木头，木材; medicine: 药物
children.statement: “provide... with...” 是固定搭配，表示“为……提供……”。
children.explanation: provide sb. with sth. 是固定用法，意为向某人提供某物，相当于 provide sth. for sb.。

children.text: Second, plants are also necessary for animals because many animals live in forests and eat fruit.
children.cn: 其次，植物对动物也是必需的，因为许多动物住在森林里并吃水果。
children.notes: necessary: 必需的，必要的; live in: 居住在; eat fruit: 吃水果
children.statement: 对于动物来说，植物不是必需的。
children.explanation: 句子中明确说明“plants are also necessary for animals”（植物对动物也是必需的）。
children.keywords: Second, necessary, animals, live, forests, eat fruit

children.text: Third, plants play an important role in protecting the environment.
children.cn: 第三，植物在保护环境中起着重要作用。
children.notes: play an important role in: 在……中起重要作用; protecting: 保护（动名词形式，作介词in的宾语）
children.statement: “play a role in” 意为“扮演角色”或“起作用”。
children.explanation: play a role in 是常用短语，表示在某事中发挥作用或扮演角色，in 后面加名词或动名词。

children.text: They help to clean the air, cover the soil, and stop the wind.
children.cn: 它们有助于净化空气、覆盖土壤和防风。
children.notes: help to do: 有助于做某事; clean the air: 净化空气; cover the soil: 覆盖土壤; stop the wind: 防风/阻挡风力
children.statement: 植物能够帮助净化空气并防止强风。
children.explanation: 句子中 clean the air 表示净化空气，stop the wind 表示挡风，这些都有利于保护环境。
children.keywords: help, clean air, cover soil, stop wind

children.text: Therefore, we must take action to protect all kinds of plants.
children.cn: 因此，我们必须采取行动来保护各种植物。
children.notes: Therefore: 因此; take action: 采取行动; all kinds of: 各种各样的
children.statement: “take action” 意为“采取行动”，其中的 “to protect” 动词不定式表目的。
children.explanation: take action to do sth. 意为采取行动去做某事，不定式 to protect 在这里作目的状语。
children.keywords: Therefore, take action, protect, all kinds of, plants

children.text: First of all, plants are of great importance to human survival because they meet our basic needs in various ways.
children.cn: 首先，植物对人类的生存具有重要意义，因为它们以各种方式满足我们的基本需求。
children.notes: First of all: 首先; of great importance: 非常重要; human survival: 人类生存; in various ways: 以各种方式
children.statement: “of great importance” 结构在句中相当于 “very important”。
children.explanation: “of + 抽象名词”结构可以用作形容词，of great importance 意为“非常重要”，作表语或后置定语。
children.keywords: First of all, great importance, survival, meet, basic needs, various ways

children.text: Not only do they supply us with essential food, but they also provide wood for shelter and materials for medicine.
children.cn: 它们不仅为我们提供必需的食物，还为我们提供建房的木材和制药的原料。
children.notes: Not only... but also...: 不仅……而且……; supply sb. with sth.: 向某人提供某物; shelter: 住所，遮蔽处
children.statement: 句首的 “Not only” 引导的句子使用了倒装语序（do they supply...）。
children.explanation: 当否定或半否定词组如 Not only 放在句首时，主句要使用部分倒装语序（助动词/情态动词前置）。
children.keywords: Not only, supply, food, but also, provide, wood, medicine

children.text: Furthermore, they serve as natural habitats for countless animals that live in forests and rely on fruits for food.
children.cn: 此外，它们作为自然栖息地，供无数生活在森林里并依靠水果为食的动物生存。
children.notes: Furthermore: 此外; serve as: 充当，作为; countless: 无数的; rely on: 依靠，依赖
children.statement: “rely on” 意为“依赖，依靠”，其中 “on” 是介词。
children.explanation: rely on/upon 是固定词组，意为“依靠，信赖”，on 在此是介词，后接名词、代词或动名词。
children.keywords: Furthermore, serve as, natural habitats, countless, live, rely on

children.text: In terms of the environment, plants are indispensable in maintaining ecological balance.
children.cn: 在环境方面，植物在维持生态平衡中是不可或缺的。
children.notes: In terms of: 在……方面，就……而言; indispensable: 不可或缺的，必需的; maintaining: 维持，保持（动名词）
children.explanation: “indispensable” 意为“不可或缺的，必需的”，其反义词是 dispensable（可有可无的）。
children.keywords: In terms of, environment, indispensable, maintaining, ecological balance

children.text: Specifically, they help clean the air we breathe, prevent soil erosion by covering the ground, and act as windbreaks.
children.cn: 具体来说，它们帮助净化我们呼吸的空气，通过覆盖地面来防止水土流失，并起到防风林的作用。
children.notes: Specifically: 具体来说; prevent: 防止; soil erosion: 水土流失/土壤侵蚀; act as: 充当; windbreaks: 防风林
children.statement: “soil erosion” 意为“水土流失”或“土壤侵蚀”。
children.explanation: soil 表示土壤，erosion 表示侵蚀。两者连用表示水土流失或土壤侵蚀，是地理和环境领域的常用词汇。
children.keywords: Specifically, clean air, prevent soil erosion, covering, act as, windbreaks

children.text: Consequently, it is our duty to protect green plants and raise public awareness of environmental protection.
children.cn: 因此，保护绿色植物并提高公众的环保意识是我们的职责。
children.notes: Consequently: 因此，结果; duty: 职责; raise: 提高，增加; public awareness: 公众意识; environmental protection: 环境保护
children.explanation: “raise” 在这里意为“提高，提升”（如提高意识），而不是“筹集，募集”。
children.keywords: Consequently, duty, protect, raise awareness, environmental protection
